did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper investigates traditional image processing techniques (morphology filters, Gaussian blur, median filters, bottom-hat filters) for hair removal and noise reduction in dermoscopy images. While it mentions that these preprocessing steps are intended to improve performance for downstream deep learning mechanisms and cites other works using AI/ML, the study itself does not employ AI, machine learning, or deep learning models to obtain its results; it relies on conventional signal/image processing algorithms and metrics like PSNR, SSIM, and MSE.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
